title: calylophus tubicula
intro: Calylophus tubicula, also known as the Desert Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calylophus tubicula include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and treating wounds. The herbal preparations of the plant can be found in ointments, salves, and tinctures that are often used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
